name: Cake Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1 Combine sugars, buttermilk, and egg; beat well.
2 Add remaining ingredients, except oil. Beat just until blended.
3 Heat oil to 375°F.
4 Drop dough from doughnut dropper into hot fat.
5 Fry until golden brown, turning often.
6 Drain.
7 One serving (1 donut) = 1 bread, 1 fat Calories = 130.
